sources.name: HMRC Bulk Imports — coffee, tea, cocoa
sources.note: Monthly per-origin imports of coffee (HS 0901), tea (HS 0902), and cocoa products (HS 18). UK has no domestic production at scale.

sources.name: Voeten — UN General Assembly Voting Data
sources.note: Used to classify each trade partner into an alignment bucket.

monthly.description: Composite monthly UK imports of coffee, tea, and cocoa.

byPartner.description: Per-origin totals across all three commodities.
